description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden construction with a curved, covered roof reminiscent of a classic wagon. The body is supported by four large spoked wheels, with two additional smaller wheels or wheel covers positioned alongside the main wheels. The cart has a rectangular cargo area at the rear, enclosed by wooden panels, and a front section with an open entry and a small step for access. Metal bands reinforce the arched roof, and there are side rails and a ladder for climbing into the cart. The overall appearance suggests a historical or rustic design, suitable for transporting goods or people in an urban or rural setting.
description: A wooden, covered handcart with large spoked wheels, side rails, and a reinforced arched roof, evoking a classic wagon style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the arched roof, open entry, and the front step, with the wheels partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length, large spoked wheels, side rails, ladder, and the covered cargo area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the enclosed cargo area, rear wheels, and the back panel of the cart.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the wheels, ladder, and side rails from the other side.
